evals.prompt: I need TLS scan for example.com.
evals.expected_output: Use the tls-scanner skill for this tls scanner request and produce the documented result for example.com.
expectations: Selects tls-scanner for requests matching its trigger description.
Uses the documented tool surface: cert_scan_protocols, cert_scan_ciphers.
Keeps the response focused on scanning TLS protocol versions and cipher suites for security assessment.

evals.prompt: Handle a focused tls scanner workflow for example.com; do not switch to a broader certificate audit unless it is required.
evals.expected_output: Use the tls-scanner skill and avoid substituting adjacent skills when the user asks for this focused workflow.
expectations: Selects tls-scanner instead of a generic certificate or TLS skill.
Avoids unrelated scanning, generation, or remediation steps unless requested.
States any required inputs or limitations from the skill instructions.
